/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -mmacosx-version-min=12.0 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o BitCrusher_artefacts/Release/VST3/BitCrusher.vst3/Contents/MacOS/BitCrusher "CMakeFiles/BitCrusher_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/BitCrusher_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_ARA.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/BitCrusher_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Standalone.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/BitCrusher_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Unity.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/BitCrusher_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/BitCrusher_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AU_1.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/BitCrusher_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AU_2.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/BitCrusher_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AUv3.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/BitCrusher_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_LV2.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/BitCrusher_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST2.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/BitCrusher_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST3.mm.o"  BitCrusher_artefacts/Release/libBitCrusher_SharedCode.a -framework WebKit -weak_framework Metal -weak_framework MetalKit -framework CoreAudioKit -framework DiscRecording -framework CoreAudio -framework CoreMIDI -framework AudioToolbox -framework Cocoa -framework Foundation -framework IOKit -framework Security -framework QuartzCore -framework Accelerate -flto -Wl,-weak_reference_mismatches,weak
